title: Stage Door
writer: Morrie Ryskind, Anthony Veiller, Edna Ferber
actors: Katharine Hepburn, Ginger Rogers, Adolphe Menjou
plot: A chronicle of the ambitions, dreams, and disappointments of aspiring actresses who all live in the same boarding house.
awards: Nominated for 4 Oscars. 2 wins & 5 nominations total
